title: maybe kaoru didnt
wikitext:
[]: maybe kaoru didn't ... (spoilers) Post by ed » Mon Jun 07, 2010 6:35 am I mean,he just said,hajimemachide,o do sama，and the next scene came gendo and fuyutsuki,maybe it was a coincident or Anno want to mislead us ....so another problem is,it is whom Kaoru call him father?I guess it's MARK 06,you can see kaoru sitting on the right hand of the EVA 06,then he turned his head right,say the words.hajimemachite........so when he sayed these words,his eyes is truely towards EVA 06,not gendo up in the air...(sorry ,i don't know how to deal with the photo ,maybe who can help),so..why he sayed,hajimemachite(first time to see),in fact ,he has met the gaint as he awaked in 1.11,why he regrads the EVA 06 as his father,or ADAM??I guess the difference is the S2. [/spoiler]

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 07, 2010 6:57 am It's pointless to tag a thread with spoilers, and put a spoiler in the title. Please don't do this again.

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Jun 07, 2010 7:34 am Dude, not all people are obligated to know what "hajimemachide,o do sama" mean. This post, while making a bit of sense /for the sake of it../ of what you asking for, really..is not making sense at all.

[]: Post by EdZ » Mon Jun 07, 2010 8:28 am 1) It's "hajimemashite" and "otou" using the standard Hepburn romanisation. 2) It's be more helpful just to use the translation: "Nice to meet you, father" 3) He's in the RIGHT hand (note the thumb in the foreground), looking right. He'd have to look back and to the left to be looking at the Mark VI.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 07, 2010 8:32 am Also, in the series (which may still be relevant), he referred to Adam as haha(?) or Mother. The being hasn't been identified as Adam, but that's my current assumption.

[]: Re: maybe kaoru didn't ... (spoilers) Post by Yossarian » Mon Jun 07, 2010 11:23 am Going with what others have said, I think it was pretty clear that Kaworu was addressing Gendo. Why? My theory is that Kaworu was created during 2I, or at least during the Katsuragi expedition, which Gendo may or may not be still a part of. Since this was hinted at in the anime and manga (his birthdate), I think Rebuild is finally going to clearly address it. Or Kaworu was just messing with us, the audience. [rambles]

[]: Re: maybe kaoru didn't ... (spoilers) Post by sephirotic » Mon Jun 07, 2010 12:10 pm Yossarian wrote: Going with what others have said, I think it was pretty clear that Kaworu was addressing Gendo. Why? My theory is that Kaworu was created during 2I, or at least during the Katsuragi expedition, which Gendo may or may not be still a part of. Since this was hinted at in the anime and manga (his birthdate), I think Rebuild is finally going to clearly address it. Or Kaworu was just messing with us, the audience. [rambles]

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 07, 2010 12:13 pm Kaworu's addressing Gendo because it's a cultural reference, close friends address their friend's parents as "father" or "mother" in Japanese culture. It could also be in a sarcastic sense, since Kaworu's something of a know-it-all regarding Shinji and perhaps Kaworu's all too aware of how Shinji and Gendo don't get along. That said, there's already another thread in existence about this subject, so please post there. Learn to use the search function or the thread list .
